title: neillia sinensis var. sinensis
intro: Neillia sinensis var. sinensis, also known as Chinese Neillia or Niulanzi, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Neillia sinensis var. sinensis include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and treating respiratory infections. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or tea, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
